---
title: "Brian's Portfolio Website Plan"
subtitle: "Proposal Presentation"
author: "Briana Maximino"
institute: "IBM 6400, Cal Poly Pomona"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: serif
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    footer: Title of Your Project
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: default
    incremental: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    slide-number: true
    scrollable: true
    smaller: true
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: false
    number-depth: 5
    embed-resources: false
    css: styles.css
editor: visual
execute: 
  echo: true
  freeze: auto
---

## My Website Plan

This presentation explains the portfolio website I am building.

The goal is to create a professional website that shows:
- my marketing skills  
- my projects  
- my analytics experience  
- my future career goals  

This website will help recruiters understand my work.

---

## Why I Need a Portfolio Website

Marketing today is very competitive.

Having only a resume is not enough.

A portfolio website helps me:
- show real projects  
- show analytics skills  
- show creativity  
- build personal brand  

This makes me more prepared for internships and jobs.

---

## Website Structure

My portfolio website will include these main pages:

- Home Page  
- Marketing Projects  
- Analytics Dashboard  
- Revealjs Presentation  
- Contact Page  

Each page has a clear purpose.

---

## Home Page

The home page will introduce me.

It will include:
- short personal statement  
- career goal in marketing  
- skills summary  
- navigation to projects  

This helps visitors quickly understand who I am.

---

## Marketing Projects Page

This page will show my marketing work.

Examples include:
- Super Soakerz campaign  
- class marketing projects  
- brand strategy work  
- campaign analysis  

This section shows real experience.

---

## Analytics Dashboard

Marketing today is data-driven.

This page will show:
- Google Analytics insights  
- campaign performance metrics  
- data visualizations  
- marketing results  

This shows I understand marketing analytics.

---

## Revealjs Presentation Page

This Revealjs presentation is part of my website.

It shows:
- my website planning process  
- my technical skills  
- my ability to present ideas  

It also shows I can use modern tools.

---

## Google Analytics Integration

I plan to connect Google Analytics to my website.

This will help:
- track visitors  
- understand engagement  
- improve marketing strategy  

Learning analytics is important for marketing careers.

---

## Career Goal

My long-term goal is to become a marketing strategist.

This website helps me:
- build credibility  
- showcase skills  
- prepare for internships  
- stand out in job market  

It is part of my professional growth.

---

## My Published Reveal Presentation

You can view my Revealjs presentation here:

[Portfolio Presentation Link](https://brianamaximino.github.io/M06/)

---

## What I Learned From Revealjs

Using Revealjs helped me learn:

- presentations can be built using code  
- slides can be interactive and modern  
- themes and transitions improve storytelling  
- publishing online is useful  

Compared to PowerPoint:
- Revealjs is more flexible  
- PowerPoint is easier at first  
- Revealjs is better for portfolios and websites  

---

## Conclusion

This website is still a draft.

But it is the foundation of my professional portfolio.

I will continue improving it as I gain more experience.

---

## Thank You
